name: Johnny Prankster
author: Poki
description: Welcome to Johnny Prankster's World! Step into the wild and wacky life of Johnny, the ultimate prankster! From sneaky setups to laugh-out-loud sibling battles, Johnny knows how to turn every moment into a hilarious adventure. Plan clever tricks, execute perfect timing, and watch the chaos unfold! With endless fun and creativity, can you out-prank everyone and become the funniest prankster in town? How to play Johnny Prankster? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD or the joystick to move. Who created Johnny Prankster? Johnny Prankster is created by Sunday Monday. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Johnny Prankster for free? You can play Johnny Prankster for free on Poki. Can I play Johnny Prankster on mobile devices and desktop? Johnny Prankster can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
